# RichConsole

> A Java port of [Rich](https://github.com/Textualize/rich) — Python's finest terminal formatting library, plus interactive prompts from [noneprompt](https://github.com/nonebot/noneprompt).

[中文](./README_CN.md)

RichConsole brings beautiful, rich text formatting to Java terminal applications. Render tables, progress bars, syntax highlighting, markdown, tree views, and more — all with full ANSI style support.

**Generated by AI because I'm too lazy to write any document haha**


## Features

- **Rich Text & Markup** — Inline markup with `[bold red]...[/]` syntax
- **Tables** — Bordered and grid tables with column styles, alignment, and multi-line cells
- **Syntax Highlighting** — Java, Python, JSON with Monokai/Vim themes and custom lexers
- **Markdown** — GFM tables, code blocks with syntax highlighting, headings, lists, blockquotes
- **Progress Bars** — Animated bars with ETA, elapsed time, speed, and spinner
- **Trees** — Directory-tree style views with configurable guides
- **Panels** — Bordered content with titles and subtitles
- **Layouts** — Split-screen terminal layouts with keyboard resizing
- **Columns** — Multi-column rendering with equal-width support
- **Pretty Printing** — Data structure visualization with indent guides
- **JSON Rendering** — Syntax-highlighted JSON with configurable indentation
- **Tracebacks** — Rich exception rendering with syntax-highlighted source context
- **Live Display** — Auto-updating display for progress, status, etc.
- **Interactive Prompts** — List selection, checkbox, confirm, and text input (from noneprompt)
- **Rules** — Horizontal divider lines with optional title
- **Align / Padding / Constrain** — Composable layout primitives

## Quick Start

### Gradle

```groovy
dependencies {
    implementation 'io.github.richconsole:richconsole:0.1.0'
}
```

### Hello World

```java
import com.justnothing.richconsole.console.Console;

Console console = Console.of(cfg -> cfg.forceTerminal(true));
console.print("[bold green]Hello, World![/]");
```

### Tables

```java
import com.justnothing.richconsole.table.Table;
import com.justnothing.richconsole.box.Box;

Table table = Table.of(cfg -> cfg
    .title("Star Wars Movies")
    .box(Box.ROUNDED)
    .expand(true));
table.addColumn("Title", "left", 40);
table.addColumn("Year", "center", 8);
table.addColumn("Rating", "center", 8);
table.addRow("A New Hope", "1977", "8.6");
table.addRow("The Empire Strikes Back", "1980", "8.7");
console.print(table);
```

### Syntax Highlighting

```java
import com.justnothing.richconsole.syntax.Syntax;

String code = """
    public class Hello {
        public static void main(String[] args) {
            System.out.println("Hello, World!");
        }
    }
    """;

console.print(Syntax.of(code, cfg -> cfg
    .lexerName("java")
    .lineNumbers(true)
    .wordWrap(true)));
```

### Progress Bar

```java
try (Progress progress = console.progress(cfg -> cfg
        .refreshPerSecond(10.0)
        .expand(true))) {
    var task = progress.addTask("Processing...", 100);
    while (!task.isFinished()) {
        Thread.sleep(100);
        task.advance(1);
    }
}
```

### Interactive Prompts

```java


// Single select
Choice<String> choice = ListPrompt.ask(
        "Pick your language:", console,
        List.of(
                new Choice<>("Java", "java"),
                new Choice<>("Python", "python"),
                new Choice<>("Rust", "rust")
        ));

        // Multi select
        List<Choice<String>> selected = CheckboxPrompt.ask(
                "Select features:", console,
                List.of(
                        new Choice<>("Syntax Highlighting", "syntax"),
                        new Choice<>("Progress Bars", "progress"),
                        new Choice<>("Tables", "tables")
                ));

        // Yes/No
        Boolean confirmed = ConfirmPrompt.ask("Continue?", console);

        // Text input
        String name = InputPrompt.ask("Your name:", console);
        String password = InputPrompt.askPassword("Password:", console);
```

### Markdown

```java
import com.justnothing.richconsole.markdown.Markdown;

String md = """
    # Hello, Markdown!
    
    This is **bold** and *italic* text.
    
    | Name  | Type |
    |-------|------|
    | Panel | Block |
    | Rule  | Block |
    """;

console.print(new Markdown(md));
```

### Custom Styling with Config

All major components support the `Config` + `Consumer<Config>` pattern for clean, keyword-style construction:

```java
// Console
Console console = Console.of(cfg -> cfg
    .forceTerminal(true)
    .width(120));

// Table
Table table = Table.of(cfg -> cfg
    .title("Results")
    .box(Box.HEAVY)
    .expand(true)
    .showLines(true));

// Panel
Panel panel = Panel.of(content, cfg -> cfg
    .title("My Panel")
    .titleAlign("center")
    .borderStyle("red")
    .expand(true));

// Syntax
Syntax syntax = Syntax.of(code, cfg -> cfg
    .lexerName("java")
    .lineNumbers(true)
    .wordWrap(true)
    .theme("monokai"));

// Progress (via console convenience method)
Progress progress = console.progress(cfg -> cfg
    .refreshPerSecond(10.0)
    .expand(true)
    .transient(false));

// Text
Text text = Text.of("Hello", cfg -> cfg
    .style("bold cyan")
    .justify("center")
    .end(""));

// Tree
Tree tree = Tree.of("Root", cfg -> cfg
    .style("green")
    .guideStyle("dim")
    .hideRoot(true));
```

## Architecture

```
io.github.richconsole
├── console/       — Console core, rendering engine, options
├── table/         — Table with bordered/grid modes
├── panel/         — Panel with titles and borders
├── text/          — Rich text with markup
├── style/         — Style definition and ANSI rendering
├── segment/       — Segment-based rendering pipeline
├── syntax/        — Syntax highlighting (Java/Python/JSON)
├── markdown/      — Markdown rendering (GFM)
├── progress/      — Progress tracking
├── progressbar/   — ProgressBar widget
├── spinner/       — Spinner animation
├── status/        — Status spinner
├── live/          — Live auto-updating display
├── tree/          — Tree view
├── rule/          — Horizontal rule
├── align/         — Alignment wrapper
├── padding/       — Padding wrapper
├── constrain/     — Size constraints
├── columns/       — Multi-column layout
├── layout/        — Split-screen layout
├── pretty/        — Pretty printing
├── json/          — JSON rendering
├── traceback/     — Exception rendering
├── noneprompt/    — Interactive prompts (List/Checkbox/Confirm/Input)
├── color/         — Color system detection and rendering
├── box/           — Box characters for tables/panels
├── markup/        — Markup parser
├── theme/         — Theme support
├── cells/         — Cell width measurement
├── control/       — ANSI control sequences
└── abc/           — Base interfaces (RichRenderable)
```

## Dependencies

- **JLine 3** — Terminal detection and raw mode (for interactive prompts)
- **commonmark-java** — Markdown parsing with GFM extensions
- **Jackson** — JSON parsing and tree model
- **Brigadier** — Added by NoneColdWind, maybe will be used in future?

## Requirements

- Java 17+ (language level), Java 8+ (API level) — uses Java 17 language features (text blocks, switch expressions, etc.) but only calls Java 8 APIs for maximum compatibility

## Acknowledgments

This project is a port of two excellent Python libraries:

- **[Rich](https://github.com/Textualize/rich)** by [Will McGugan](https://github.com/willmcgugan) — The original Python library that inspired this entire project. If you find RichConsole useful, please consider [sponsoring Will on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/willmcgugan).
- **[noneprompt](https://github.com/nonebot/noneprompt)** by NoneBot team — The Python interactive prompt library that we ported for the `noneprompt` module.
